ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "mean_overall_age_last2weeks" REAL /* Mean age of all cases in the last two weeks */,
  "mean_hospitalized_age_last2weeks" REAL /* Mean age of hospitalized cases in the last two weeks */,
  "mean_death_age_last2weeks" REAL /* Mean age of deaths in the last two weeks */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the time period */,
  "total_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations in the time period */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the time period */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Rate of new cases per 100,000 population */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalizations per 100,000 population */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Rate of deaths per 100,000 population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area for the time period */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Rate of recoveries in the time period */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Rate of tests conducted per 100,000 population */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of deaths among confirmed cases */,
  "hospitalization_fatality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of deaths among hospitalized cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., hospital, health department) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data was updated */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age distribution entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-10, 11-20, etc.) */,
  "cases_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the age group */,
  "hospitalized_count" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalized cases in the age group */,
  "deaths_count" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the age group */,
  "recovered_count" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases in the age group */,
  "testing_count" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted in the age group */,
  "vaccinated_count" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distributions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality of the data */,
  "data_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of data collected (e.g., number of records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
